pi_items.source: Task description (task.json lines 5-15) specifies Title: 'Vandalism - Dragline 4'
Task description specifies narrative containing '...rear counterweight of Dragline 4...' which matches the dragline excavator's real mechanical components (draglines have counterweights for balance)
Task description specifies Report Type: 'Vandalism' (or 'Other' if not available). However, verifier.py does not actually validate report type, it only validates title and narrative content.

privileged_info_summary: This is a synthetic task in OpenCAD, an open-source CAD system designed for roleplay communities. The task requires creating an incident report with title 'Vandalism - Dragline 4', a narrative containing 'spray paint', 'counterweight', and 'Dragline 4', and report type 'Vandalism'. All metadata claims match the task description. The scenario uses realistic technical details (draglines have counterweights), but 'Dragline 4' is a fictional identifier. The OpenCAD environment imports GTAV (Grand Theft Auto V) game data, confirming the synthetic nature of the task. Success requires the agent to create and save the report to the MySQL database with the specified details.
